game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Full Throttle Remastered is a point-and-click graphic adventure game where players control protagonist Ben Throttle to solve environmental and inventory-based puzzles. Players navigate 2D scenes by tapping on interactive hotspots, which reveal a context-sensitive action menu (e.g., Look, Talk, Use) from which an action is selected. Inventory items, accessed via a dedicated UI, are dragged and dropped onto objects or other inventory items to combine or use them, advancing the linear narrative. Dialogue trees allow players to select responses to NPCs, influencing information gathered or triggering events, while occasional motorcycle combat sequences are controlled via directional swipes to attack or dodge. Progression is purely story-driven, with success defined by solving puzzles to unlock new areas and plot points, leading to the game's conclusion.
game_info.description: You are Ben Throttle, a biker caught in a conspiracy. Navigate through scenes, interact with objects and characters to solve puzzles, and uncover the truth. Click on hotspots to examine, talk, or use items. Collect inventory items and combine them to progress. Make dialogue choices carefully—they may unlock new paths or information. Complete all puzzles to reach the thrilling conclusion and clear your name!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between scenes and select dialogue options
Space: Open/Close inventory panel
Z: Confirm action selection or interact with highlighted object
Shift: Cycle through available actions (Look, Talk, Use, Take)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction test. Validates that the player can navigate between scenes, interact with objects, and access the inventory system. Tests fundamental game mechanics without attempting to solve complex puzzles.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move through available scenes using arrow keys. Interact with various hotspots using Z key. Cycle through action types with Shift. Open inventory with Space to verify item collection works. Perform basic interactions to ensure the game responds correctly to all input types.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates between scenes, interacts with multiple objects, and accesses inventory. All input commands register properly. No crashes or unexpected behavior. Test validates core mechanics are functional.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal win strategy test. Implements the complete solution path to beat the game by solving all puzzles in the correct sequence. Tests puzzle logic, item combinations, dialogue choices, and story progression to reach the winning end state.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow the optimal puzzle solution path: examine key objects, collect necessary items, combine inventory items in the correct order, make specific dialogue choices that advance the plot, and use combined items on appropriate hotspots. Navigate through all required scenes in sequence to trigger story events leading to victory.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Game progresses through all story beats without getting stuck. All puzzles are solved efficiently. Player reaches the final scene and triggers the win condition (GAME_OVER_WIN). The game completes in a reasonable time frame demonstrating that the win condition is achievable.
